description: Launch or start any installed application on Windows like Discord, Notepad, Spotify, or calculator
Power off or shut down the computer completely to turn it off
Reboot or restart the computer to refresh the system
Put the computer into hibernate or sleep mode to save power
Lock the workstation or computer screen to secure it
Open a website link or URL in the default browser like Chrome or Firefox
Open a file explorer window to browse files at a specific path or directory
Retrieve system information like Windows version, CPU, RAM, and hardware specs
Read or get the current text content stored in the clipboard
Copy or write text to the clipboard so it can be pasted elsewhere
